hero.designNotes: Editorial magazine-style Gujarati wedding hero for Kavya & Mihir. The layout is an asymmetric two-column grid: a bold typographic left column anchored by oversized Rozha One display names in maroon/rust, flanked by an intricate right-column decorative panel featuring a slow-spinning ornamental ring, CSS-only diya trio with flickering flame animation, a marigold bead garland arc, rangoli dot constellation, and a frosted-glass "Save the Date" badge. The color palette draws from saffron, marigold gold, maroon, and rust against a warm ivory/cream gradient base. Floating marigold petals animate upward on the left edge. Cormorant Garamond italic is used for the hero message to deliver romance and cultural warmth. All cultural elements (diyas, marigold garlands, rangoli geometry, toran-inspired corner ornaments) are rendered entirely in CSS without any imagery. Fully responsive with stacked single-column layout at 900px and compact mobile treatment at 640px.
